mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOriOrdDtRefSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 원 출고주문 현황 : 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT OHR.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OHR.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OHR.OBHDDAY /*주문지시일시*/ , OHR.OBREQDATE /*출고희망일자*/ , MIN(CASE WHEN WH.WAHDKEY IS NULL THEN OH.OBWKDATE ELSE WH.WAHDDAY||'000000' END) AS OBWKDATE /*작업일자*/ , OHR.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고완료일시*/ , OHR.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , ODR.OBORDDTKEY /*오더상세코드*/ , OHR.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OHR.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , (CASE WHEN COUNT(OD.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN '10' /*출고대기*/ WHEN COUNT(OD.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('60','65','70') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN '20' /*출고완료*/ WHEN COUNT(OD.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('97','98','99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN '30' /*출고취소*/ WHEN COUNT(OD.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('00','01','97','98','99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)THEN '10' /*출고대기*/ WHEN COUNT(OD.OBHDKEY) = SUM(CASE WHEN OD.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('60','65','70','97','98','99') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN '20' /*출고완료*/ ELSE '40' END) AS OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고작업상태*/ , ODR.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.SLPRC AS AMT /*단가*/ , SUM(OD.INITQTY) AS OB_ORD_QTY /*주문_EA*/ , SUM(IC.SLPRC * OD.INITQTY) AS OB_ORD_SLPRC /*주문_금액*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ALQTY > 0 THEN OD.ALQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EXP_QTY /*예정_EA*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.ALQTY > 0 THEN IC.SLPRC * OD.ALQTY ELSE 0 END) AS EXP_SLPRC /*예정_금액*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.PKISTQTY > 0 THEN OD.PKISTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_QTY /*지시_EA*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.PKISTQTY > 0 THEN IC.SLPRC * OD.PKISTQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_SLPRC /*지시_금액*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.CNFRMQTY > 0 THEN OD.CNFRMQTY ELSE 0 END) AS OB_QTY /*출고_EA*/ , SUM(CASE WHEN OD.CNFRMQTY > 0 THEN IC.SLPRC * OD.CNFRMQTY ELSE 0 END) AS OB_SLPRC /*출고_금액*/ , ODR.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , ODR.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , ODR.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , ODR.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_HD OHR INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_ORD_DT ODR ON OHR.CTKEY = ODR.CTKEY AND OHR.OWKEY = ODR.OWKEY AND OHR.OBORDKEY = ODR.OBORDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH ON OHR.CTKEY = OH.CTKEY AND OHR.OWKEY = OH.OWKEY AND OHR.OBORDKEY = OH.OBORDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON ODR.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND ODR.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND ODR.OBORDKEY = OD.OBORDKEY AND ODR.OBORDDTKEY = OD.OBORDDTKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON ODR.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ODR.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ODR.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON ODR.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ODR.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ODR.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY WHERE OHR.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OHR.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OHR.OBORDKEY = #{obordkey} GROUP BY OHR.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OHR.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OHR.OBHDDAY /*주문지시일시*/ , OHR.OBREQDATE /*출고희망일자*/ , OHR.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고완료일시*/ , OHR.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , ODR.OBORDDTKEY /*오더상세코드*/ , OHR.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OHR.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , ODR.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.SLPRC /*단가*/ , ODR.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , ODR.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , ODR.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , ODR.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOriOrdDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 원 출고주문 현황 : 상세 조회 조회 */ SELECT * FROM (
) ORDER BY OBORDKEY , OBORDDTKEY
mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOrdDtRefSql - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고 현황 : 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT OD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBREQDATE /*주문지시일시*/ , OH.OBHDDAY /*출고희망일자*/ , CASE WHEN WH.WAHDKEY IS NULL THEN OH.OBWKDATE ELSE WH.WAHDDAY||'000000' END AS OBWKDATE /*작업일자*/ , OH.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고완료일시*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OH.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , OH.OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , OD.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태*/ , OD.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , IC.SLPRC /*단가*/ , IC.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , IC.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ , ICUTX.ICUNITQTY /*카톤입수*/ , OD.INITQTY /*주문수량*/ , OD.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , OD.ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , OD.PKISTQTY /*지시수량*/ , OD.PKQTY /*피킹수량*/ , COALESCE(OD.PKISTQTY, 0) - COALESCE(OD.PKQTY, 0) AS INCQTY /* 미피킹수량*/ , OD.CNFRMQTY /*출고수량*/ , OD.NISQTY AS NIS_CNFRM_QTY /*결품수량*/ , COALESCE(OD.INITQTY, 0) * COALESCE(IC.SLPRC, 0) AS AMT /*금액*/ , ICUTXEA.VOL * OD.INITQTY AS CBM /*총CBM*/ , (ICUTXEA.WEIGHT * OD.INITQTY) / 1000 AS WEIGHT /*총중량*/ , OH.CLASSIFSPECCD /*DAS규격*/ , OH.ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문유형*/ , OH.WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , (SELECT WH.WAHDNM FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH WHERE OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY) AS WAHDNM /*WAVE*/ , OH.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천박스*/ , BOX_REC.BOXNM AS RECOMBOXNM , OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE /*출고박스*/ , BOX_PCKG.BOXNM AS PCKGBOXNM , OH.CMT /*비고*/ , OH.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OH.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OH.OBWKISTURKEY /*작업지시자*/ , OH.OBWKDATE AS OBWKDT /*작업지시일시*/ , OH.PCKGURKEY /*포장작업자*/ , OH.PCKGDATE /*포장작업일시*/ , OD.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , OD.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , OD.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OD.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , OD.OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTX ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTX.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTX.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTX.ICKEY AND ICUTX.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXEA ON OD.CTKEY = ICUTXEA.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUTXEA.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = ICUTXEA.ICKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = ICUTXEA.ICUNITKEY AND ICUTXEA.ICUNITTYPECD = OD.UOM LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX_REC ON OH.CTKEY = BOX_REC.CTKEY AND OH.RECOMBOXBARCODE = BOX_REC.BOXBARCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_BOX BOX_PCKG ON OH.CTKEY = BOX_PCKG.CTKEY AND OH.PCKGBOXBARCODE = BOX_PCKG.BOXBARCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey}
mapper.select:
/* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOrdDt - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고 현황 : 상세 조회 조회 */ SELECT * FROM (
) ORDER BY OBHDKEY /*출고번호*/ , CAST(OBDTKEY AS NUMERIC) /*출고주문상세번호*/

/* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOrdHdOrderExcel - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고 현황 : 주문별 탭 엑셀조회 */ WITH OB_BASE AS (
) SELECT OB.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OB.CTNM /*센터명*/ , OB.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OB.OBREQDATE /*주문지시일시*/ , OB.OBHDDAY /*출고희망일자*/ , OB.OBWKDATE /*작업일자*/ , OB.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고완료일시*/ , OB.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OB.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OB.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CD1.CTCDDTNM AS OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형 (코드)*/ , CD2.CTCDDTNM AS OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태 (코드)*/ , OB.OB_ORD_SKU AS OB_ORD_SKU /*주문_SKU*/ , OB.OB_ORD_QTY AS OB_ORD_QTY /*주문_EA*/ , OB.OB_ORD_SLPRC AS OB_ORD_SLPRC /*주문_금액*/ , OB.EXP_SKU AS EXP_SKU /*예정_SKU*/ , OB.EXP_QTY AS EXP_QTY /*예정_EA*/ , OB.EXP_SLPRC AS EXP_SLPRC /*예정_금액*/ , OB.ORDER_SKU AS ORDER_SKU /*지시_SKU*/ , OB.ORDER_QTY AS ORDER_QTY /*지시_EA*/ , OB.ORDER_SLPRC AS ORDER_SLPRC /*지시_금액*/ , OB.OB_SKU AS OB_SKU /*출고_SKU*/ , OB.OB_QTY AS OB_QTY /*출고_EA*/ , OB.OB_SLPRC AS OB_SLPRC /*출고_금액*/ , OB.NIS_CNFRM_SKU AS NIS_CNFRM_SKU /*결품_SKU*/ , OB.NIS_CNFRM_QTY AS NIS_CNFRM_QTY /*결품_EA*/ , OB.NIS_CNFRM_SLPRC AS NIS_CNFRM_SLPRC /*결품_금액*/ , OB.CBM /*총CBM*/ , OB.WEIGHT /*총중량*/ , CD3.CTCDDTNM AS CLASSIFSPECCD /*DAS규격*/ , CD4.CTCDDTNM AS ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문유형*/ , CD5.CTCDDTNM AS WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OB.WAHDNM /*WAVE명*/ , OB.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , OB.RECOMBOXNM /*추천박스명*/ , OB.PCKGBOXNM /*출고박스명*/ , OB.CMT /*비고*/ , OB.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , OB.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , OB.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OB.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , OB.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OB.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OB.OBWKISTURKEY /*작업지시자*/ , OB.OBWKDT /*작업지시일시*/ , OB.PCKGURKEY /*포장작업자*/ , OB.PCKGDATE /*포장작업일시*/ , OB.WKCNLREQYN /*작업취소요청여부*/ FROM OB_BASE OB INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD1 /*출고유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD1.CTKEY AND OB.OBHDTYPECD = CD1.CTCDDTKEY AND CD1.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBHDTYPECD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD2 /*출고상태*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD2.CTKEY AND OB.OBSTATUSCD = CD2.CTCDDTKEY AND CD2.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBSTATUSCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD3 /*DAS규격*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD3.CTKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = CD3.CTCDDTKEY AND CD3.CTCDHDKEY = 'CLASSIFSPECCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD4 /*주문유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD4.CTKEY AND OB.ORDSEPTYPECD = CD4.CTCDDTKEY AND CD4.CTCDHDKEY = 'ORDSEPTYPECD' LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD5 /*작업유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD5.CTKEY AND OB.WKTYPECD = CD5.CTCDDTKEY AND CD5.CTCDHDKEY = 'WKTYPECD' ORDER BY OBHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-oborderList-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOrdHdDetailExcel - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고 현황 : 상세별 탭 엑셀조회 */ WITH OB_BASE AS (
) SELECT OB.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OB.CTNM /*센터명*/ , OB.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OB.OBREQDATE /*주문지시일시*/ , OB.OBHDDAY /*출고희망일자*/ , OB.OBWKDATE /*작업일자*/ , OB.OBCNFRMDATE /*출고완료일시*/ , OB.OBORDKEY /*오더코드*/ , OB.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OB.EXTERNORDERKEY /*고객주문번호*/ , CD1.CTCDDTNM AS OBHDTYPECD /*출고유형*/ , CD2.CTCDDTNM AS OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , CD3.CTCDDTNM AS OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세상태*/ , OB.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , OB.ICNM /*상품명*/ , OB.SLPRC /*단가*/ , OB.PKOTICYN /*덕용여부*/ , OB.ROBSORTERICYN /*로봇여부*/ , OB.ICUNITQTY /*카톤입수*/ , OB.INITQTY /*주문수량*/ , OB.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , OB.ALQTY /*할당수량*/ , OB.PKISTQTY /*지시수량*/ , OB.PKQTY /*피킹수량*/ , OB.INCQTY /* 미피킹수량*/ , OB.CNFRMQTY /*출고수량*/ , OB.NIS_CNFRM_QTY /*결품수량*/ , OB.AMT /*금액*/ , OB.CBM /*총CBM*/ , OB.WEIGHT /*총중량*/ , CD4.CTCDDTNM AS CLASSIFSPECCD /*DAS규격*/ , CD5.CTCDDTNM AS ORDSEPTYPECD /*주문유형*/ , CD6.CTCDDTNM AS WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OB.WAHDKEY , OB.WAHDNM /*WAVE*/ , OB.WBLNO /*송장번호*/ , OB.RECOMBOXBARCODE /*추천박스*/ , OB.RECOMBOXNM , OB.PCKGBOXBARCODE /*출고박스*/ , OB.PCKGBOXNM , OB.CLASSIFCNTRBARCODE /*분류TOTE*/ , OB.CNTRBARCODE , OB.CNTRWKURKEY , OB.CNTRDDLNYN , OB.CMT /*비고*/ , OB.ORDSEPURKEY /*주문분리자*/ , OB.ORDSEPDATE /*주문분리일시*/ , OB.OBWKISTURKEY /*작업지시자*/ , OB.OBWKDT /*작업지시일시*/ , OB.PCKGURKEY /*포장작업자*/ , OB.PCKGDATE /*포장작업일시*/ , OB.INSERTURKEY /*입력자*/ , OB.INSERTDATE /*입력일시*/ , OB.UPDATEURKEY /*수정자*/ , OB.UPDATEDATE /*수정일시*/ , OB.WKCNLREQYN /*작업취소요청여부*/ , OB.SKU , OB.PCS , OB.CTN_YN /*카톤입수여부*/ , OB.FBQTY /*이형물QTY*/ , OB.VOL , OB.WEIGHT_ORI , OB.WIDTH , OB.DEPTH , OB.HEIGHT , OB.MAXLEN /*상품길이*/ FROM OB_BASE OB INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD1 /*출고유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD1.CTKEY AND OB.OBHDTYPECD = CD1.CTCDDTKEY AND CD1.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBHDTYPECD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD2 /*출고상태*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD2.CTKEY AND OB.OBSTATUSCD = CD2.CTCDDTKEY AND CD2.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBSTATUSCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD3 /*출고상세상태*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD3.CTKEY AND OB.OBDTSTATUSCD = CD3.CTCDDTKEY AND CD3.CTCDHDKEY = 'OBSTATUSCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD4 /*DAS규격*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD4.CTKEY AND OB.CLASSIFSPECCD = CD4.CTCDDTKEY AND CD4.CTCDHDKEY = 'CLASSIFSPECCD' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD5 /*주문유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD5.CTKEY AND OB.ORDSEPTYPECD = CD5.CTCDDTKEY AND CD5.CTCDHDKEY = 'ORDSEPTYPECD' LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT CD6 /*작업유형*/ ON OB.CTKEY = CD6.CTKEY AND OB.WKTYPECD = CD6.CTCDDTKEY AND CD6.CTCDHDKEY = 'WKTYPECD' ORDER BY OBHDKEY
